mapper.select: SELECT svg.vip_rank_code AS vipRankCode, vr.vip_rank_name_i18n_code AS vipRankName, svg.vip_grade_code AS vipGradeCode, svg.vip_grade_name AS vipGradeName, svg.upgrade_xp AS upgradeXp, svg.upgrade_bonus AS upgradeBonus, svg.pic_icon AS picIcon FROM site_vip_grade svg LEFT JOIN site_vip_rank vr ON vr.vip_rank_code = svg.vip_rank_code and svg.site_code = vr.site_code WHERE svg.site_code = #{siteCode} order by svg.vip_grade_code asc
